title: These Japanese AI winners don’t make chips. They make toilets, glass fiber and seasoning
summary: A toilet maker, glass fiber manufacturer, and MSG producer have become major beneficiaries of Japan's AI boom, demonstrating how AI adoption extends beyond traditional tech sectors. These diverse industrial companies are leveraging AI innovations to improve productivity and global competitiveness.
content: A toilet maker, a glass fiber manufacturer and the maker of MSG have in Japan have become major beneficiaries of the AI boom.

zh.title: 这些日本AI赢家不生产芯片。他们生产马桶、玻璃纤维和调味料
zh.summary: 一家马桶生产商、玻璃纤维制造商和味精生产商成为日本AI热潮的主要受益者，展示了AI采用如何超越传统技术部门。这些多元化的工业公司正在利用AI创新来提高生产力和全球竞争力。

title: Trump plans steep tariffs on generic drugs starting in 2028 to spur U.S. production
summary: The Trump administration plans to implement steep tariffs on generic drugs starting in 2028 to incentivize domestic manufacturing. The phased tariff approach aims to shift pharmaceutical production onshore.
content: The phased schedule is intended to push generic drugmakers to move production onshore.

zh.title: 特朗普计划从2028年开始对仿制药征收高关税以刺激美国生产
zh.summary: 特朗普政府计划从2028年开始对仿制药实施高关税，以激励国内制造。分阶段关税方法旨在将制药生产转移到国内。

title: Japan exports and imports grow at fastest pace in June since November 2022, beating estimates
summary: Japan's exports grew 19.3% and imports increased 25.4% in June compared to the prior year, marking the fastest growth pace since November 2022. The stronger-than-expected trade figures signal robust economic momentum in the world's third-largest economy.
content: Exports climbed 19.3%, while imports spiked 25.4% compared to June last year.

zh.title: 日本6月出口和进口增长创2022年11月以来最快速度，超出预期
zh.summary: 日本6月份出口同比增长19.3%，进口增长25.4%，创2022年11月以来最快增长速度。这些超出预期的贸易数据表明全球第三大经济体经济势头强劲。

title: Super Micro’s stock soars as its margins unexpectedly double
summary: Super Micro, an AI server manufacturer, saw its stock surge after reporting that gross margins are expected to reach 15-17%, doubling previous levels. The improvement reflects favorable shifts in customer and product mix.
content: The AI server maker now expects gross margins to be in the range of 15% to 17% thanks to an improving customer and product mix

zh.title: 超微股价飙升，其毛利率意外翻倍
zh.summary: AI服务器制造商超微公司股价飙升，在报告称毛利率预计将达到15-17%（较之前水平翻倍）后。这一改善反映了客户和产品组合的有利转变。

title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market
summary: Sony's decision to restrict disc sharing on PlayStation has sparked backlash from gamers who note the irony, given Sony's 2013 marketing campaign criticizing Xbox's restrictive policies. The move threatens a $7 billion secondhand game resale market.
content: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.

zh.title: 索尼"讽刺的" PlayStation光盘决定颠覆游戏玩家惯例，威胁70亿美元二手市场
zh.summary: 索尼限制PlayStation光盘共享的决定引发了游戏玩家的强烈反对，他们指出这与索尼2013年批评Xbox限制性政策的营销活动形成讽刺对比。此举威胁到70亿美元的二手游戏转售市场。

title: Wall Street can wait: Why one U.S. biotech firm is listing in Hong Kong first
summary: A U.S. biotech company is choosing to list in Hong Kong before Wall Street, drawn by the city's expanding investor base and proximity to Chinese pharmaceutical partners. The trend reflects growing appeal of Hong Kong for global biotech firms seeking Asian exposure.
content: Global biotech firms are increasingly being drawn to Hong Kong for its growing investor base and proximity to Chinese pharmaceutical partners.

zh.title: 华尔街可以等待：为什么一家美国生物技术公司先在香港上市
zh.summary: 一家美国生物技术公司选择先在香港上市而不是华尔街，吸引因素包括该市不断扩大的投资者基数和与中国制药合作伙伴的接近。这一趋势反映了香港对寻求亚洲敞口的全球生物技术公司的吸引力不断增强。

title: Nike to cut off thousands of online distributors in China, restructure digital footprint
summary: Nike is streamlining its online retail network in China by cutting thousands of distributors as part of a broader digital restructuring. The move aims to stabilize pricing, protect brand positioning, and reignite growth in the critical market.
content: Nike is streamlining its online business in China as the company looks to stabilize pricing and branding and get back to growth.

zh.title: 耐克削减数千名中国在线经销商，重组数字足迹
zh.summary: 耐克通过削减数千名经销商来精简其在中国的在线零售网络，作为更广泛的数字重组的一部分。此举旨在稳定定价、保护品牌定位，并在这个关键市场上重启增长。
